description_long: This is a robust hammer with a rectangular, metallic head featuring two brown bands secured by gold rivets, giving it a reinforced appearance. The head is solid and blocky, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty striking tasks, such as demolition or driving large stakes. The handle is straight, dark brown, and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, capped at the bottom with a conical, dark gray end piece that may provide additional grip or protection. The metallic head has a matte finish, with no visible claws or peens, indicating it is a sledgehammer type. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The hammer appears new and undamaged, with clean surfaces and no signs of wear.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a rectangular metallic head, reinforced by brown bands and a straight dark handle with a conical end. The design is clean, robust, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad rectangular face of the metallic head, brown bands with gold rivets, and the straight handle with a conical end.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow profile of the hammer head and the full length of the handle, with the conical end visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite broad face of the head and the same banded reinforcement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow edge of the head and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark finish and a conical, dark gray end cap; smooth surface with no visible ergonomic enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of metal, reinforced with two brown bands and gold rivets; both striking faces are flat and broad, with no claws or peens.
